race.comment: The first of the features now and it's all about WONDERFULLY MADE (2) who looks a very exciting filly. She was very good first-up before streeting her rivals over the mile at Belmont last time out. She's expected to be better again out in trip and Pike hops on board. She looks well above average and she can extend her winning run. ADMIRE ASTRA (4) stuck on gamely first-up from a wide draw to just miss as favourite before holding her own in the Challenge Stakes at Bunbury most recently. Up to 1800m now doesn't look an issue and she's shown glimpses of talent throughout her career. Can feature in the finish. NATURE'S RECKONING (3) dropped back in grade last start and was far too good at Pinjarra. Back up to 1800m is the query, though she's right down in the weights and her run in the Breeders' stands out. MONTE TREMEZZO (1) is worth including on her last start win, while MASMELO (5) flew home first-up over 1400m and creates plenty of interest.
